text.title: PMBoK 8 Six Core Principles Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: All six principles pass without explicit evidence quotes.
antipattern.root-cause: LLM politeness artefact: all-green output without citations.
antipattern.fix: Require quoted evidence per passed principle; reject quote-less outputs.

antipattern.symptom: 'Build Empowered Teams' invoked to justify removing governance or oversight.
antipattern.root-cause: Empowerment requires working agreements and decision rights, not absence of process.
antipattern.fix: Require offsetting governance artefact (working agreements, decision rights).

antipattern.symptom: 'Quality' used as a standalone domain inside PMBoK 8 audit.
antipattern.root-cause: PMBoK 8 does not have a Quality domain; quality is the Embed Quality principle.
antipattern.fix: Reject audits that name Quality as a domain.
